title: colubrina ruffa var. glandulosa
intro: Colubrina ruffa var. glandulosa is a plant species known for its medicinal properties, belonging to the family Rhamnaceae. It is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer health benefits like reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting overall well-being. Additionally, its leaves and stems are used in folk medicine to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats.
